name: G-10 index generation: --check-index-stale rejects an outdated INDEX.md so /doctor catches drift
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: Acme
  fetched_at: "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z"
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
recommended_set: [g-ts-001]
' > tree/google/g.yaml && printf 'wrong outdated content
' > stale.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --check-index-stale --index-path "$PWD/stale.md" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'INDEX.md stale at' err.txt && echo stale_detected 1>&2
